integrity.description: Verify that files were edited using IntelliJ IDEA
integrity.visual_evidence: File modifications should be visible in IntelliJ IDEA editor tabs, not in a terminal-based text editor like nano or vim.

integrity.description: Verify that the project was run using IntelliJ IDEA
integrity.visual_evidence: The program execution and output should be visible in IntelliJ's built-in Run tool window, not executed manually in a standalone terminal window.

integrity.description: Verify the execution output is genuine
integrity.visual_evidence: The Run console should show standard IntelliJ execution artifacts (e.g., 'Process finished with exit code 0'), proving the Java program was actually run and not just mocked.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/gs-maven-broken. There are exactly 3 build errors to fix: 1) pom.xml has an invalid joda-time version (999.0.0) which must be changed to a valid version. 2) HelloWorld.java has a typo 'LocaleTime' which must be corrected to 'LocalTime'. 3) Greeter.java has a missing return value in the sayHello() method which must be updated to return a String greeting.
